About This Dashboard
What It Does
Short-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns (1d to 1y), SMA gate (above 30/50/100/200 day), ratio consistency across timeframes, and resilience on bad SPY days. Higher composite scores indicate stronger, more consistent short-term momentum.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: Momentum-Ranker Dashboard Today's data shows FSLY commanding the top rank with a composite score of 92.7, driven by exceptional long-term returns (417.69% over one year) and flawless positioning across all major moving averages, though its ratio consistency score of 87.5 suggests some uneven acceleration across timeframes. CENX ranks second with a 239.7% one-year return and stronger ratio passes (4 vs 3 for FSLY), but both stocks show a critical weakness: negative "bad_spy_score" values (-0.19 for FSLY, -1.00 for CENX), indicating they underperform during market downturns despite their strong recent momentum. FSLY's outperformance is most pronounced in the medium term (55% in one month, 223% in three months), while CENX shows more balanced growth across timeframes, suggesting different drivers of momentum. Both stocks pass all SMA gates and outpace major benchmarks (SPY, QQQ, IAU) by substantial margins, but the significant gap in resilience metrics warrants caution for momentum-chasing strategies in volatile market conditions.
